title: Technip Energies Awarded a FEED Contract for Jet Zeroâ€™s Sustainable Aviation Fuel Project in Australia
content: Technip Energies (PARIS:TE) has been awarded a Front-End Engineering Design (FEED) contract by Jet Zero Australia Pty Ltd (Jet Zero) for Project Ulysses, a bioethanol to sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) project located in Townsville, Australia. The FEED covers an extensive package of engineering activities, documentation and planning to refine the cost estimate for the project and develop detailed timelines. The project aims to produce 102 million liters of SAF and 11 million litres of renewable diesel annually by 2028 using Australian bioethanol and technologies from Technip Energies and LanzaJet.
author: Analysts Account
